channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Australian Magician Daniel Hidden Vanishes With Mysterious Message, Police Seek Public Help

media:content.media:description: Police search for magician Daniel Hidden last seen June 14 in Broadbeach towing a caravan.

item.description: Queensland Police seek help locating magician Daniel Hidden, who has been missing since June 14 in Broadbeach.
item.content:encoded: Queensland Police seek help locating magician Daniel Hidden, who has been missing since June 14 in Broadbeach.

item.title: Why Netanyahu Is Struggling To Respond To Trump's Iran Agreement

media:content.media:description: Iran could receive relief from economic sanctions and get access to about $300 billion.

item.description: The deal reportedly leaves open questions about what will happen to Iran's stockpile of enriched uranium.
item.content:encoded: The deal reportedly leaves open questions about what will happen to Iran's stockpile of enriched uranium.

item.title: Video: Passenger Lets Dog Sit On Plane's Tray Table, Triggers Hygiene Debate

media:content.media:description: The video gained attention, with users arguing that the owner should have followed airline policies

item.description: Social media users are divided after footage showed a passenger letting her dog sit outside its carrier during a flight
item.content:encoded: Social media users are divided after footage showed a passenger letting her dog sit outside its carrier during a flight

item.title: "Won't Make It Back To Your F***ing Country": Trump Warns Iran Amid Talks

media:content.media:description: Trump underscored threat on Truth Social in which he urged Iran to stop Hezbollah militants in Lebanon

item.description: The safe passage of commercial vessels through the strait is critical to bringing down global oil prices.
item.content:encoded: The safe passage of commercial vessels through the strait is critical to bringing down global oil prices.

item.title: Israeli Troops Uncover Hezbollah's Underground Drone Factory In Lebanon

media:content.media:description: Military officials described the underground site as a drone factory

item.description: Israeli troops say the underground complex was used to assemble and launch Iranian-made drones toward Israel.
item.content:encoded: Israeli troops say the underground complex was used to assemble and launch Iranian-made drones toward Israel.

item.title: Who Is Abelardo De La Espriella, The Lawyer Elected Colombia's New President

media:content.media:description: De La Espriella began gaining popularity early in the year with his tough-on-crime discourse

item.description: De La Espriella, 47, used a military salute throughout his campaign despite never having served in the military.
item.content:encoded: De La Espriella, 47, used a military salute throughout his campaign despite never having served in the military.

item.title: Explained: Who Is Fighting Whom In Lebanon

media:content.media:description: The fighting is no longer just a Lebanon-Israel issue.

item.description: The latest violence in southern Lebanon is rooted in a long-running rivalry that continues to shape Middle East politics.
item.content:encoded: The latest violence in southern Lebanon is rooted in a long-running rivalry that continues to shape Middle East politics.

item.title: China Stayed Out Of The War. It May Still Be One Of The Biggest Winners

media:content.media:description: China criticised the attacks on Iran and opposed the killing of Iranian leaders

item.description: When the war began, China criticised the attacks on Iran and repeatedly called for talks and a peaceful solution.
item.content:encoded: When the war began, China criticised the attacks on Iran and repeatedly called for talks and a peaceful solution.

item.title: Who Is Andy Burnham? The Man Who Could Replace Keir Starmer

media:content.media:description: Andy Burnham is a senior British Labour politician.

item.description: If Starmer steps down, it could create an opportunity for Andy Burnham, one of Labour's most well-known politicians, to take over as Labour Party leader.
item.content:encoded: If Starmer steps down, it could create an opportunity for Andy Burnham, one of Labour's most well-known politicians, to take over as Labour Party leader.

item.title: 'Dubai-It': The Philosophy Of One Of World's Fastest-Changing Cities

media:content.media:description: Dubai ranks among the world's top destinations for tourism, business and talent.

item.description: Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum, Vice President and Prime Minister of the UAE and Ruler of Dubai, launched a campaign called Dubai-it.
item.content:encoded: Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum, Vice President and Prime Minister of the UAE and Ruler of Dubai, launched a campaign called Dubai-it.

item.title: Small Canadian Town Recognises Trees As Living Beings With Rights

media:content.media:description: Terrasse-Vaudreuil leads Canada by recognising trees as living beings with rights.

item.description: Terrasse-Vaudreuil adopts a resolution supporting the Universal Declaration of the Rights of the Tree.
item.content:encoded: Terrasse-Vaudreuil adopts a resolution supporting the Universal Declaration of the Rights of the Tree.

item.title: Video: Massive Fireball And Smoke After Explosion At Qatar Gas Facility

media:content.media:description: Ras Laffan had already suffered significant damage during the US-Iran war

item.description: The Ras Laffan complex had also been hit earlier in March, when an Iranian missile struck the area, sparking a fire that caused "extensive" damage before it was put out
item.content:encoded: The Ras Laffan complex had also been hit earlier in March, when an Iranian missile struck the area, sparking a fire that caused "extensive" damage before it was put out

item.title: Keir Starmer On The Brink With Resignation Plan Expected Imminently

media:content.media:description: Keir Starmer prepares to announce a timetable for his departure amid rising pressure from Andy Burnham.

item.description: Keir Starmer faces calls to step down after Andy Burnham's election victory boosts leadership challenge prospects.
item.content:encoded: Keir Starmer faces calls to step down after Andy Burnham's election victory boosts leadership challenge prospects.

item.title: General Motors Facing Backlash For Replacing Over 1,000 Human Workers With 50 Robots At Detroit Plant

media:content.media:description: GM installs 50 cobots at Michigan plant, eliminating over 1,000 assembly jobs.

item.description: General Motors has replaced workers with robots at its Detroit plant amid union concerns and an automation push.
item.content:encoded: General Motors has replaced workers with robots at its Detroit plant amid union concerns and an automation push.

item.title: Pakistan Seeks Diplomatic Boost With Key Role In US-Iran Peace Talks

media:content.media:description: Pakistan's diplomacy elevates its global stature amid US-Iran peace negotiations.

item.description: Pakistan emerges as a central player in US-Iran peace talks praised by US Vice President.
item.content:encoded: Pakistan emerges as a central player in US-Iran peace talks praised by US Vice President.

item.title: 54 Injured, 18 Missing After Explosion At Qatar's Natural Gas Hub

media:content.media:description: The scale of the damage remains unknown after the blast

item.title: First High-Level US-Iran Talks See Key Agreements After Brief Walkout

media:content.media:description: The committee agreed on a roadmap aimed at reaching a final deal within 60 days

item.description: The joint statement said the summit was conducted in a "positive and constructive atmosphere," with encouraging progress made.

item.title: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US-Iran Negotiations End, Technical Talks Will Continue

media:content.media:description: US-Iran Peace Talks Live Updates

item.description: US-Iran Peace Talks Live Updates: JD Vance had on Thursday cancelled his trip to Switzerland amid rising tension in Lebanon between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Peace Talks Live Updates: JD Vance had on Thursday cancelled his trip to Switzerland amid rising tension in Lebanon between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah.

item.title: Pak Minister Threatens War Against India Over Water Security Amid Crisis

media:content.media:description: Pakistan threatens war with India over water disputes as internal water crisis worsens.

item.description: Pakistan's Defence Minister Khawaja Asif threatens war against India over water security amid internal crisis.
item.content:encoded: Pakistan's Defence Minister Khawaja Asif threatens war against India over water security amid internal crisis.

item.title: Woman, 76, Killed After Tesla Driver On Autopilot Crashes Into Her Texas Home

media:content.media:description: A Tesla in autopilot crashed into a Texas home, killing a 76-year-old woman inside.

item.description: Tesla Model 3 with automated driving crashed into a Texas house, fatally hitting a woman.
item.content:encoded: Tesla Model 3 with automated driving crashed into a Texas house, fatally hitting a woman.
